description: They always answer the phone. This is a big deal to me. NO menus that have changed, and no runaround. They assign you a contact person and you get their direct dial number. It is easy to work with them.
author: James L.
pros: the Price was the attraction and prompted the call to them, but the service of the support team is what really sold me. I am able to ask questions that get things done and I can do the things I want to do without them so I get exactly what I want.
cons: they could not use my existing website, which was done in Word Press, and was what I understood the best in the market at this time. They convinced me that rebuilding the site with their software would be better and cheaper. The look of the finished product is the same so I am satisfied.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

review_title: Very Happy with our Decision to Switch to Webit
description: Very satisfied, meets our needs, and customer support has been wonderful when needed.
author: James A.
pros: Ease of set up, and their internal team was very helpful during the transition.
cons: My competitor’s websites are more current and engaging. However I understand they probably invested more to achieving this.

review_title: Don't Use this Company for Your Website Build
author: Lisa H.
pros: Nothing. The website was subpar with a cart for some reason even though we are a service-based business.
cons: They take advantage of clients' lack of knowledge about domains and domain ownership. They convince you to let them "take care of the domain" by buying it themselves through GoDaddy for less than $20 per year, then when you want to get access to your domain, they charge a $125 fee along with making you pay to make your account active (another $50). I have been building websites for over 10 years, and when a client wanted to swap to my service, they held the client's domain hostage until they were paid the $175. Truly despicable!
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Tammy D.
pros: They communicate quickly and thoroughly. The products that are offered by Webit I previously had to get separately from 3 different companies and Webit offers all of them in one place for a very reasonable price.
cons: I can't think of anything I did not like about Webit.

description: The whole process. From the first initial call with [sensitive content hidden] to working with all the Webit team members until the completed website to go Live couldn't be more pleased.
author: Ricardo R.
pros: The additional features for contractors to send estimates, invoices, etc. Contractors can run a good portion of their business from the additional features all in one place.
cons: None. No complaints.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Simply wonderful!! If any changes ever need to be made, they’re on top of it immediately
author: Robbie B.
pros: Customer service has been the best. We’ve been using them for over 3 years. They’ve made our website extremely professional, clean & simple to navigate. They also linked our website to our crm program so that potential clients and requests quotes.
cons: There’s nothing I don’t like…… I absolutely satisfied with them

description: Very good experience. Jeremyband team were very responsive.
author: Andy P.
pros: They have designers, but also allow front-end customization. Also reasonablebprice.
cons: It would be nice to be able to integrate the scheduler and calendar with Google Calendar.

author: Joey R.
pros: Great price for a small business, we started our business wih then and have gotten many compliments on our site design.
cons: Support is a little slow, i learned to add reviews to the site myself because it takes to long otherwise.

review_title: Webit - a great company for managing your website
description: everything has been great so far. They helped us
author: Daniele S.
pros: Their customer service team is excellent and easy to work with. They help with any changes I want to make on the website.
cons: Sometimes there are some grammer issues when they make changes that they don't catch. Sometimes it may take a little longer for changes to be made.

review_title: creation. of my website for my business
description: Overall the experience was pretty good - no major complaints
author: Carol M.
pros: Overall the ease of creating and customer support was very good
cons: Again, some design elements were a bit difficult and not intuitive

description: Has completely went up and beyond my expectations. Has done an incredible job listening to my concerns, the look of my website and making sure that everything is handled.
author: Suzy K.
pros: Great customer service, do a wonderful job making my website stand out.
cons: Takes awhile to get changes done but no other concerns since they do a fantastic job.

description: I am very happy with the results and how helpful they were to Branda.
author: Birgit F.
pros: They worked on the changes in a timely matter.
cons: I need to learn to make my own changes. Not easy to figure out.

review_title: Contracts are dead, Service is King and Webit Understands this much better than the competition
description: They have been a great service provider for our website -- I have previously done all this work myself in the past and then gradulally paid service providers to take on more of the work with some very bad experiences. But the crew at Webit have done an outstanding job -- Especially with no contracts -- As any online services business should understand that a monthly contract is just an excuse to take your money. Bottom line is this --- If you don't like the service your getting and can't get it fixed then you shouldn't have to pay extra like I have with companies that still have contracts That's an old way of doing online business these days and gets abused by deceitful companies all of the time You don't have to worry about that with Webit as they actually have business ethics.
author: Tim B.
pros: The Team behind the websites - Always supportive, honest, friendly, helpful with professionalism and a sense of humor. Also the ability for me to be able to change things or add content and/or images to our website. The Home Page is the only part that the work order system would take up to 3 days sometimes based on their work load of customer request. So the people who speak American, living in America working with Americans was a breath of fresh air due to the issues and problems I have had in the past.
cons: At the price point I'm paying monthly with no contracts with supportive, knowledgeable, competent and professional people don't have any cons Maybe other than not finding them sooner than I did.

description: Great and prompt customer service with knowledge of marketing.
author: Francisco S.
pros: Ease of use. Ability to access software to upload content and make changes when I need it.I hardly have to call Webit for assistance.
cons: Inability to link bank account for taking payments online.

description: Great overall experience. I’m bing on customer service and they definitely make you feel like family.
author: Vincent C.
pros: Customer service is great! Process was easy.
cons: Not being able to have multiple addresses for the same person when adding to contacts.

description: Wonderful, Fantastic, Superior experience and professional company to work with. A+++++
author: Robert G.
pros: Easy to setup, great impact both visually and as a selling tool. Great media imprint for your dollar to customer branding value. Superior product
cons: Not much to say negatively. We have had a superior experience with the whole product and support team

review_title: Customer service service is very helpful.
description: Great
author: Janine S.
pros: Our website has looks wonderful. The staff were always very helpful.
cons: I can't think of anything I dislike about webit.

description: Excellent!! All the staff are friendly & eager to help build your site, add to it etc… Great customer service at Webit.
author: Marci M.
pros: Super affordable and easy to understand
cons: Some of the integrations can’t be met yet with Webit but in time I’m sure they will.

review_title: Not conducive to quality time management
description: Our organization uses the website to share information to members and the information shared changes often. The time we spend is volunteer hours so having to take more time than needed to make updates is frustrating.
author: Nate A.
pros: I can't find anything with this platform that is better than others I have used.
cons: It's not easy to use and there are too many unnecessary steps involved in making edits.

review_title: Easy to Use at a Great Price
description: We have been with Webit for a couple of years now and are so pleased with our website. Moving our website to Webit was so easy, and the design team did such a great job not only making sure to get all the content transferred over but also gave our website a much need facelift. Our website now has a fresh, polished, and professional look and they continue to fine tune and help us put our best foot forward. We received so many compliments on how much easier it is to navigate and how great it looks.
author: Deb M.
pros: I love that I can update our website myself. The software is easy to use and I can add, remove or update in just a few easy steps. It is easy to maintain and we are able to stay current without any delays. Everything I do displays in actual time so I know our website is always current.
cons: I am currently using Google Docs to maintain our database... I would like an easier way to manage our members and our vendors. Being able to upload spreadsheets and store important business documents would also be a great benefit. We are a non-profit with a rotating board and having all information in one location would help in sharing information and having everything in one location.

description: I love Webit and will continue to work with them.
author: Chandrelle H.
pros: I have no complaints about Webit. I can call [sensitive content hidden] for anything.
cons: That there isn't an option for an interactive blog for your customers. And that there's no option for discount code to give to your customers to enter for a discount.

description: It is a great website tool that our company has used for quite some time.
author: Kelsie K.
pros: I love that I can do most of the editing and changes to our website ourselves. I find it very helpful that as soon as I call our rep. he always picks up and follows through with our requests.
cons: I do not like the few features that are hard for the customer, us, to complete on our own.

description: Great. Good Local Company that has a good product. Still would like to take [SENSITIVE CONTENT] out to lunch sometime.
author: James M.
pros: I usually just have the account manager help with it and do not touch it in fear I will mess it up. Except this last go round, they have not returned my text/call as we found a grammar error
cons: There is nothing that I would say it bad

description: In a word, awesome.
author: Troy S.
pros: It has been the biggest advantage over my competitors in driving sales. The company is fast to make changes I request. Ease of their system and way of doing business is crucial to my company and they always exceed my expectations.
cons: I rarely get to keep my same account manager. They always get promoted or something. But they have all been great.

description: Very good
author: Chris S.
pros: Like it very much they protect my invest which is my company's picture
cons: Like webit they are effective at every call
